codeReview.summary: Feature implementation satisfies requirements. Repository scope is mandatory in search(), language and task_type are optional filters. Cross-repo isolation is enforced. The prior blocking issue (get_by_type/get_by_label/get_by_provenance lacking repository filtering) was fixed in commit 024eda6.

sharedStateObservations.observation: pattern_learning.rs line ~1087 still has 'repository: String::new()' bug in committed code at HEAD (2ca2579). Working directory has the fix but it's not committed. This is the same bug that affects memory-pattern-learning.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show HEAD:crates/swell-memory/src/pattern_learning.rs | rg 'repository: String::new' -B3 -A3 shows the bug. git diff HEAD shows working directory fixes it to 'repository: self.repository.clone()'

summary: mem-scoping feature passes review. The prior blocking issue (get_by_type/get_by_label/get_by_provenance missing repository filtering) was fixed in commit 024eda6. However, there remains a shared bug in pattern_learning.rs where convention blocks are stored with empty repository string - this bug exists in committed code at HEAD but the fix is present in working directory.
